chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1636 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6997/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.6998/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 07.11.2023 Mr. Rehmat Ali Shaikh alias Raza Ali, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 & 3. Petitioner claims to be a Contractor by profession and has moved this petition for seeking directions to respondents to entertain his application and decide the same in accordance with law, and to initiate an inquiry against the respondents for committing corruption and malpractice in tender proceedings. Learned Counsel has failed to satisfy the Court about filing of the petition directly in the Court without availing a proper remedy against the respondents before the relevant forums including their high officials and reporting the matter to Anti- Corruption Police against them. Even the copy of the application, which the petitioner seeks to be entertained by the respondents and decided accordingly, has not been filed in the petition for appreciation. In view of above, this petition, being meritless, is dismissed in limine along with listed application, leaving the petitioner, however, at liberty to avail his remedy in accordance with law, before the proper forum. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
